# Next-Frame.Agency

> AI marketing agency based in Makati, Philippines. We build AI content systems, premium AI video, social media management, and marketing automation for small businesses — turning views into leads and inquiries. A human owns strategy and approves everything; AI handles production volume.

## Services
- [AI Marketing Agency Philippines](https://next-frame.agency/ai-marketing-agency-philippines/): AI content systems, social automation, and reels for Philippine small businesses.
- [AI Real Estate Marketing](https://next-frame.agency/ai-real-estate-marketing/): Turn property listings into Reels, posts, ads, and auto-replies for PH real estate agents.
- [AI Social Media Management Manila](https://next-frame.agency/ai-social-media-management-manila/): Done-for-you social content and inquiry replies for Metro Manila businesses.
- [Logo Design](https://next-frame.agency/logo-design/): Logo and brand identity design.

## Resources
- [Pricing Guide](https://next-frame.agency/pricing/): What social media management and AI marketing cost in the Philippines (2026 guide).
- [AI vs Traditional Agency](https://next-frame.agency/ai-vs-traditional-agency/): Honest 2026 comparison of cost, speed, output, and control for PH small businesses.
- [Free Resources](https://next-frame.agency/free-resources/): Free guides, scripts, and checklists for local-business growth.

## Guides
- [AI Search Is Changing How Filipino Customers Find You](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-search-how-customers-find-you/): More Filipinos now ask ChatGPT, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews to find businesses instead of scrolling links. Here is what changed and the concrete steps to get your business named.
- [AI Agents for Small-Business Marketing: What They Are and How to Use Them](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-agents-for-your-marketing/): A plain-English guide for Philippine SMBs: what an AI agent really is, five marketing jobs it can handle, the free tools to start with, and how to stay safe.
- [Free and Low-Cost AI Video Tools for Reels in 2026: An Honest Guide](https://next-frame.agency/blog/free-ai-video-tools-for-reels/): An honest 2026 roundup of free and low-cost AI video tools for Reels — Veo 3.1, Runway, Kling, Pika and more — plus a real workflow to turn one photo into a Reel.
- [AI and Free Public Data for Market Research in the Philippines](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-market-research-free-data/): A step-by-step guide for Philippine small businesses to research customers, competitors, and demand using Google Trends, PSA OpenSTAT, Meta Business Suite, and free AI tools, all at zero cost.
- [The 2026 AI Marketing Toolkit for Philippine Small Businesses](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-toolkit-2026/): A practical, honest guide to the AI tools a Philippine SMB should know across content, video, ads, DMs, SEO, and research — plus a free 7-day start plan.
- [How to Make AI Video Ads for Your Small Business in 2026 (The Real Workflow)](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-video-ads-workflow/): A plain-English, honest guide for Philippine SMBs on making AI video ads in 2026 — real tools, real costs in pesos, and the human editing the hype skips.
- [Build Your Business Website With AI: No Developer, No Agency Bill](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-website-builder-small-business/): A plain-English guide for PH small business owners: how AI website builders really work, the real tools and prices, and a realistic path to a simple site with your own domain.
- [Free AI Tools That Audit Your Marketing (Honest 2026 Guide)](https://next-frame.agency/blog/free-ai-tools-audit-your-marketing/): Paste your website URL and an AI agent audits your SEO, content, and AI-search visibility. A plain-English look at Okara, claude-seo, and how to use them safely.
- [Stop Your AI From Agreeing With Itself: The Second-Opinion Trick for Better Marketing Copy](https://next-frame.agency/blog/stop-ai-agreeing-with-itself/): AI tends to praise its own marketing copy and flatter you into shipping weak ads. Here's the free second-opinion trick to get honest feedback in ChatGPT, Claude or Gemini.
- [How an AI-Native Agency Actually Works (And 5 Habits You Can Borrow)](https://next-frame.agency/blog/how-an-ai-native-agency-works/): A plain-English look at how an AI-native marketing team works in 2026, with 5 habits a non-technical Philippine business owner can copy today, mostly free.
- [Turn Web Apps Into Fast Desktop Apps: A Practical AI Workspace Guide](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-desktop-apps-and-workspace/): Tired of 20 browser tabs? Turn ChatGPT, Gmail, and Notion into fast desktop apps with your browser's built-in tools or the free Pake app. Honest setup and real costs.
- [Turn Property Photos Into 3D Virtual Tours: A Real Estate Guide](https://next-frame.agency/blog/property-3d-virtual-tours-from-photos/): Turn ordinary phone photos or video into interactive 3D tours and fly-throughs buyers can explore. Verified free and paid tools, a capture workflow, honest limits, and how to share on Facebook and Lamudi.
- [AI Voiceovers for Your Reels and Ads: Natural, Cheap, Taglish-Ready](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-voiceovers-for-your-content/): Pro voiceovers for your Reels and ads without hiring talent each time. The real AI voice tools, free vs paid tiers, Taglish quality, and a simple workflow.
- [AI Talking-Avatar Videos: A Spokesperson Without a Camera](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-talking-avatar-videos/): Make presenter-style videos without filming. An honest guide to HeyGen, Synthesia, and open-source avatar tools — free tiers, peso costs, AI-disclosure rules, and when a real person still wins.
- [Turn Your Business Numbers Into Shareable Infographics With AI](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-infographics-from-your-data/): You have good numbers but no designer. Here is a free, honest workflow using Napkin AI, Canva, and Claude to turn sales and reviews into clean Facebook and Instagram graphics.
- [AI Prompts That Turn One Property Listing Into a Week of Content](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-prompts-property-listing-content/): Copy-paste AI prompts that turn one PH property listing into a Reel script, Facebook captions, a carousel, ad headlines, and ready-to-send inquiry replies.
- [Let AI Answer Your Facebook and Messenger Inquiries 24/7 (Safely)](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-answer-messenger-inquiries/): A customer messages your Page at 11pm and you reply the next afternoon — that's a lost sale. Here's how PH SMBs safely automate Messenger with free Meta tools and AI, and what to never let a bot decide.
- [How Much Does AI Marketing Cost in the Philippines (2026)? Real Price Breakdown](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-marketing-cost-philippines/): A straight breakdown of AI marketing costs for PH small businesses in 2026: free tools, cheap ₱300/month subscriptions, and what an agency retainer actually buys.
- [Create SOPs With AI in One Afternoon (Free Tools, PH SMB Guide)](https://next-frame.agency/blog/create-sops-with-ai/): Your business runs on what's in your head, not on paper. Learn how PH SMB owners use free ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini to turn 5 daily tasks into clean SOPs in one afternoon.
- [Google Business Profile Philippines Setup Guide (2026)](https://next-frame.agency/blog/google-business-profile-philippines/): A 2026 guide to setting up Google Business Profile for Philippine businesses - verification, categories, photos, reviews, and common mistakes to avoid.
- [AI Product Photography for Small Business: Menus & Listings](https://next-frame.agency/blog/ai-product-photos-menus-listings/): A zero-to-low-cost, honest AI product photography workflow for PH SMBs selling on Shopee, Lazada, and Facebook, using real tools and real pricing.
